properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v3 v4 v14 v15 v16

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm calling on the God of Jacob Whose love endures through generations, I know that You will keep Your covenant.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm calling on the God of Moses, The one who opened up the ocean, I need You now to do the same thing for me. For me, for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O God, my God, I need You O God, my God, I need You now How I need You now.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O Rock, O Rock of ages, I'm standing on Your faithfulness, On Your faithfulness.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm calling on the God of Mary, Whose favor rests upon the lowly, I know with You all things are possible.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm calling on the God of David, Who made a shepherd boy courageous, I may not face Goliath, but I've got my own giants.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: It's your faithfulness I'm standing on, Never changes, Never changes.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You heard Your children then, You hear Your children now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You answered prayers back then, And You will answer now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: You were providing then, You are providing now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: You moved in power then, God, move in power now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: You were a healer then, You are a healer now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: You were a savior then, You are a savior now, You are the same God, You are the same God!

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: You freed the captives then You’re freeing hearts right now You are the same God You are the same God

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: You touched the lepers then I feel Your touch right now You are the same God You are the same God

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: I’m calling on the Holy Spirit Almighty River come and fill me again.
